expression.description: Symfony ExpressionLanguage adapter — sandbox + performance guards.

keys.description: Hard wall-clock deadline per expression evaluation. Passed to ExpressionLanguageAdapter as a max-execution-time guard. Failures fire ApproverSelectorEvaluationFailed(failure_reason='timeout').
TTL for the compiled-expression AST cache. Keyed on SHA-256(expression_source). Bypasses on template edits via ApprovalTemplateObserver's cache invalidation.
Refuse expressions longer than this at template-authoring time (returns INVALID_EXPRESSION). Guards against DoS via pathologically-long expressions that would slow parsing.

Default reminder cadence when a template's reminder_config.intervals_hours is omitted. Each element = hours since instance.requested_at (OR last reminder, whichever is later) before dispatching the next reminder.
Hard cap on reminders per approver per instance. Overridable per template via reminder_config.max_reminders.
How many pending requirements the DispatchApprovalRemindersJob processes per invocation. Higher = fewer job invocations but longer per-run duration.
Fallback when a template's expires_after_hours is unspecified. 168 = 7 days.
Horizon schedule cadence for ExpireOverdueApprovalsJob. Match the Schedule::everyFiveMinutes() entry.
How many overdue instances the sweeper processes per invocation. A backlog drains across multiple invocations.
Hold-period for rejected + expired + cancelled instances before hard-delete.
7 years — SOC 2 CC6.3 evidence-retention requirement for executed approvals.
Approval-adjacent audit records (Auditable::audits rows) retained separately from instance rows so a purge doesn't lose the audit trail.
Master toggle. When false, template edits directly UPDATE the row (no version bump). Off only for dev/testing — production leaves versioning on for audit.
Per-template version-history cap. Beyond this, oldest is_active=false versions are hard-deleted on the daily reconciler pass.
Max size of PreflightTemplateInput.context_variables JSON blob. Guards against DoS on the preflight endpoint.
When true, reject decisions require a comment (min 10 chars). SOC 2 CC6.3 evidence.
Enforced by min_reject_comment_length rule + ApprovalDecisionObserver.
Hard cap to prevent DB row bloat.
When true, an approver_id matching the instance's requester_id is refused UNLESS the template group's allows_self_approve=true. Guards against social-engineering seams.
Max size of an instance's context_json. Guards against actions passing massive payloads through the engine.

Enables the regex-based PAN-detection scan on context_json at instance-create time. Detected patterns fire ApprovalSecurityViolation(violation_type='restricted_context_leak') + refuse the instance creation.
Sweepers + P0 notifications go here. Isolated from tenant-provisioning queues so a template misconfiguration can't stall onboarding.
Approval-lifecycle notifications share the standard notifications queue.
Compliance-report generation is CPU-heavy + latency-tolerant — isolated queue with different worker sizing.
Purger + reconciler go here — low-priority, run overnight.
When true, ApprovalPresenter includes DelegationSubstitutedApprover events in the projected decision timeline. Off for tenants where delegation is a security concern.
Cap on number of context_json fields projected onto the wire (avoids leaking large payloads to admin UIs).
